summary: First iteration testing of Aura Astrology app (Expo RN + FastAPI). Backend: 21/21 pytest cases passed including WebSocket AI reply flow with Claude sonnet-4-6 (real reply received, wallet deducted from $50 -> $25). Frontend: Login (phone/OTP=123456), Home tab, Astrologers list + Tarot filter + detail page + sticky Chat CTA, real-time chat with AI reply via WebSocket, Wallet +$25 (50 -> 75 with transaction row), Kundli zodiac Aries reading + Calculate Chart returning planets/sun-sign, Profile with logout returning to /login, and /admin gate showing 'Admin only' for non-admin all verified. No red screens, no critical errors. One minor React Native warning surfaced in console: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — non-blocking. No deprecated Expo packages detected (no expo-av / expo-barcode-scanner / expo-background-fetch usage).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Likely from a third-party RN dependency. Non-blocking but should be audited.

action_items: (Optional) Trace the source of 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' warning — likely a third-party lib (react-native-web / expo-linear-gradient / lucide) — and upgrade or wrap to remove the warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~850 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, astrologers, chat, wallet, kundli, admin) once feature-set grows.

CORS middleware is added AFTER app.include_router in server.py (line 842 vs 844). In FastAPI/Starlette middleware should be added before routes are registered; currently it still works because Starlette resolves middleware lazily, but this ordering is fragile — move add_middleware() above include_router.
Auth for /api/chats and /api/wallet correctly requires Bearer token; /api/kundli/generate also requires auth (verified).
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded via projection {"_id": 0} across all endpoints — good.
seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with 'TEST_'. Created ephemeral phone users (+15551234567, +15559998888, +15557776666) and a chat with astro_1. No cleanup performed but data is isolated (TEST_ prefix / random phones).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login flow: click [data-testid=login-phone-button] -> fill [data-testid=phone-input] -> click [data-testid=send-otp-button] -> fill [data-testid=otp-input] with '123456' -> click [data-testid=verify-otp-button]. Wallet top-up testIDs are 'add-money-25' (not wallet-add-25). Kundli zodiac testIDs are 'zodiac-Aries' (not kundli-zodiac-Aries). Chat CTA on astrologer detail is 'start-chat-cta'. Chat send button is 'chat-send'. Profile logout is 'profile-logout'. Admin route /admin renders 'Admin only' for non-admin users (200 OK page).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no issues found. Backend 21/21 pytest passing. Full E2E frontend flow (login -> browse -> chat with AI -> wallet top-up -> kundli -> logout) verified with screenshots.
